description: F25 Rule Testing UI (new coverage, Sprint 40, authored 2026-06-05). Opens the 'Test a pattern against sample emails' tool from Manage Rules, enables the plaintext-to-regex toggle, types a plaintext pattern, runs Test against the bundled demo emails, then returns home WITHOUT saving any rule. Read-only: the Test tool computes matches only; it does not persist. Selectors verified against live UI 2026-06-05.

testCases.title: Open Test tool, run a plaintext pattern, return home

steps.selector: type=Button[name='Test a pattern against sample emails']
